confirmed_user_measurements.note: Immediate swap after skill start. Kept separate from same-character input timing.

methodology.same_character_input: 派生帧, delayed by applicable self hitstop; action end used only when no derivation/input rule exists.
methodology.swap_input: Stored separately from same-character input. Explicit 不能切人 rules and user measurements take precedence.
methodology.action_end: 动作结束帧; generic post-swap visual linger is action end + 19F.
methodology.detachable_packet: 可脱手 applies to the generated judgement, not to the whole character action.
methodology.scheduled_tail: Packets after the next-input frame remain scheduled only under the source detach/generation branch.
methodology.damage_simplification: Hit aggregation remains allowed, but pre-input and post-input/off-field packets must be separated.

known_limitations: Generic mid-action swap timing is not derivable for every action from the workbook.
Falling-action timings remain context dependent unless a fixed starting-height contract is supplied.
Echo timing remains outside this three-character action audit.
The generic 1.0-second swap re-entry contract is a separate simulation assumption and currently conflicts with the measured Vivid 1F swap route.
v1_corrections: Vivid swap input is 1F user-measured, not an unresolved or guessed value.
Vivid same-character input remains separate and audits to 153F; current 149F is 4F short.
Lynae Liberation same-character input 238F and swap input 240F must be separate.
Polychrome Leap Stage 3 and its C1 variant are structural swap-persistence gaps, not PASS.
Palette and Kaleidoscopic Basic Stage 5 require generated packet chains, not PASS.
Lynae Outro damage is not executed by the transition runtime and must overlap the incoming Intro.
A numeric frame match no longer implies the structural action model is complete.
Mutually exclusive mode packets must not have their hitstops summed together.

cross_system_issues.finding: Returning to Mornye 1F after Vivid starts remains blocked by the existing 1.0-second combat-time re-entry cooldown. Artificial waits change the user route.
cross_system_issues.recommendation: Audit the generic swap re-entry contract separately. Do not hide this conflict by serializing Vivid for 149F or inserting an undocumented wait.
cross_system_issues.required_test: Replay Mornye -> Lynae Liberation -> Vivid -> 1F swap request and expose the exact re-entry decision without resource fixtures.

cross_system_issues.finding: The Lynae Outro transition hook applies metadata/buffs but does not execute the damage packets defined in actions.json.
cross_system_issues.recommendation: Schedule outgoing Outro damage independently and concurrently with the incoming Intro.
cross_system_issues.required_test: A full-Concerto Lynae transition must produce outgoing damage and incoming Intro on overlapping timelines with no 153F serialization.
